recommendations.title: Kill Shot
recommendations.overview: Posing as hunters, a group of terrorists are in search of $100 million that was stolen and lost in a plane crash en route from Afghanistan.

recommendations.title: Death of a Unicorn
recommendations.overview: A father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to a weekend retreat, where his billionaire boss seeks to exploit the creature’s miraculous curative properties.

recommendations.title: God Willing
recommendations.overview: The son of an atheist, authoritarian father, believed to be liberal, wants to become a priest.

recommendations.title: S.M.A.R.T. Chase
recommendations.overview: A washed-up private security agent has to escort a valuable Chinese antique out of Shanghai but is ambushed en route.

recommendations.title: I'm So Excited!
recommendations.overview: Something has gone wrong with the landing gear of a plane en route from Madrid to Mexico City. The group of eccentric travelers on the flight, defenseless in the face of danger, indulge in colourful confessionals, while the outlandish crew attempts t

recommendations.title: Stephanie
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious global crisis, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home. Her parents eventually return and the struggle begins to save their daughter.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: The Mimic
recommendations.overview: The mother of a missing child takes in a lost girl she finds in the woods, but soon begins to wonder if she is even human.

recommendations.title: Trafic
recommendations.overview: Mr. Hulot is the head designer of the Altra Automotive Co. His latest invention is a newfangled camper car loaded with outrageous extra features. Along with the company's manager and publicity model, Hulot sets out from Paris with the intention of de

recommendations.title: Judgment Night
recommendations.overview: Four young friends, while taking a shortcut en route to a local boxing match, witness a brutal murder which leaves them running for their lives.
